texto: Know how to choose. Most things in life depend on it. You need good taste and an upright judgement
autor: intelligence and application are not enough. There is no perfection without discernment and selection.
explicacao: Citação de intelligence and application are not enough. There is no perfection without discernment and selection. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Know how to choose. Most things in life depend on it. You need good taste and an upright judgement” articula reflexao, baltasar-gracian, choose em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
